name: verify_start
description: Start a phone number verification flow by sending a one-time PIN code to the specified phone number. The code can be delivered via SMS, voice call, WhatsApp, or email. Use this for two-factor authentication, phone number confirmation, or user identity verification. Returns a request_id that must be passed to verify_check to validate the code entered by the user.

parameters.name: brand
parameters.description: The brand or application name displayed to the user in the verification message (e.g., 'Acme Corp'). Maximum 16 characters for SMS.

parameters.name: workflow
parameters.description: Array of verification workflow steps. Each step defines a channel ('sms', 'voice', 'whatsapp', 'email') and target ('to' number/email). Multiple steps create fallback chains if earlier steps fail.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale for the verification message (e.g., 'en-us', 'fr-fr'). Determines the language of the default message template.

parameters.name: channel_timeout
parameters.description: Seconds to wait before moving to the next workflow step. Default is 300 (5 minutes).

parameters.name: code_length
parameters.description: The length of the verification code. Must be between 4 and 10. Default is 4.
